login.heading: Customer Portal

approveModal.title: Approve Quote
approveModal.body: You are about to approve this quote. This action will notify our team to proceed with the work.

rejectModal.title: Reject Quote
rejectModal.body: You are about to reject this quote. Please provide a reason to help us understand your concerns.
rejectModal.reasonPlaceholder: Please explain why you're rejecting this quote...

payments.heading: My Payments
payments.subtitle: View your payment history and download receipts for your records.

communications.heading: Communications

settings.heading: Account Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your portal account settings and security
settings.passwordChangedBody: Your password has been updated. Use your new password for future logins.
settings.requirementMix: Mix of letters, numbers, and symbols recommended
settings.errTooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters long
settings.errFailed: Failed to change password. Please try again.

common.portalUnavailableBody: The customer portal is not currently enabled for this account. Please contact us directly for updates on your case.
common.footerHelp: Need assistance? Contact our support team for help.
